zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse於1058年出生在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯時，她的父親Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain27歲，母親Maud de Montgomery11055歲。她於1072年之前與Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1080年在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡斯卡享年22歲。

zh-hans.Huesca, Huesca, Aragon, Spain: 西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡斯卡

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse于1058年出生在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛圖勞斯时，她的父亲Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain27岁，母亲Maud de Montgomery11055岁。她于1072年之前与Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉圖勞勒-a奧结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1080年在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡斯卡享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse was born in 1058, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, her father, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, was 27 and her mother, Maud de Montgomery, was 11055. She married Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse before 1072, in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1080, in Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spain, at the age of 22.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse est née en 1058, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maud de Montgomery, avait 11055 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse avant 1072, à Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1080, à Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Espagne, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse 1058 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain 27 und ihre Mutter Maud de Montgomery 11055. Sie hat vor 1072 in Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1080 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse è nata il nel 1058 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Maud de Montgomery, aveva 11055 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse prima del 1072, nel Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1080, nel Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spagna, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouseが1058年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Robert de Conteville Count of Mortainは27歳，母Maud de Montgomeryは11055歳であった。1072年以前にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラトウロウセ-レ-チaテアウでGuillaume IV Comte de Toulouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1080年にスペインアラグoンハエスカハエスカで22歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse(이)가 1058년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Montgomery(은)는 11055세였다. 그녀는 1072년 이전 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 토우루세-레-cha테오에서 Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1080년 스페인 아라그o 후스카 후스카에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse nasceu em 1058, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Montgomery, tinha 11055 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse antes 1072, em Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1080, em Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Espanha, com 22 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse родилась в 1058 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Montgomery, 11055. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse перед 1072 г. в местности тоулоусе-ле-чaто, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1080 г. в местности хуеска, хуеска, арагoн, Испания в возрасте 22 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Mortain Countess of Toulouse nació en 1058, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maud de Montgomery, tenía 11055 años. Se casó con Guillaume IV Comte de Toulouse antes de 1072, en Toulouse-le-Château, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1080, en Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, España, a la edad de 22 años.
